interface_order_constraint: Interfaces from earlier PBs are not changed by later PBs; changes require explicit evidence.
notes: PB-171 validates required component presence and blocks missing rollback evidence.
purpose: Validate all prior runtime hardening interfaces and define rollback/integration readiness checks.
title: PB-171 VERIFIED: Rollback Layer Integration Matrix Readiness Review
